experiments.name: global_theme_overview
experiments.query: What are the major themes across the corpus about endurance training, nutrition, and performance improvement?
experiments.purpose: 适合做主题概览，观察跨文档汇总能力
experiments.command: python -m graphrag query --root . --method global "What are the major themes across the corpus about endurance training, nutrition, and performance improvement?"
experiments.comparison_focus: global 更适合跨文档主题归纳；local 更适合围绕具体实体和事实追问
evaluation_dimensions: 是否贴近知识图谱中的实体关系

experiments.name: local_fact_lookup
experiments.query: What are the reported effects of HIIT and MICT on running economy and VO2max?
experiments.purpose: 适合做具体事实查询，观察局部证据检索能力
experiments.command: python -m graphrag query --root . --method local "What are the reported effects of HIIT and MICT on running economy and VO2max?"
experiments.comparison_focus: global 更适合跨文档主题归纳；local 更适合围绕具体实体和事实追问
evaluation_dimensions: 是否贴近知识图谱中的实体关系
